evals.prompt: Review the SCSS file for style violations. List every issue you find.
evals.expected_output: Lists all violations: duplicate $primary variable, properties in .productCard not alphabetical (should be background, border-radius, color, display, padding), duplicate background property in .productCard, two ID selectors in one rule (#sidebar #logo), class .productCard uses lowercase instead of BEM PascalCase (should be .ProductCard).
assertions: Reports properties in .productCard are not alphabetical
Reports the duplicate background property in .productCard
Reports two ID selectors in the #sidebar #logo rule
Reports .productCard uses lowercase instead of BEM PascalCase (ProductCard)

evals.prompt: Write a SCSS block for a card component with a header element and a featured modifier. Follow all code style rules.
evals.expected_output: Uses BEM: .Card as root, .Card-header as element, .Card--featured as modifier. All properties alphabetically ordered. No duplicate properties. 2-space indentation.
assertions: All CSS properties are in alphabetical order
